name: ca-court-docs
description: Draft and format pleadings, declarations, motions, notices, and proposed orders for California courts. Applies California Rules of Court 2.100-2.119 statewide formatting; includes Los Angeles Superior Court and San Francisco Superior Court specifics plus a county-courts roll-up; supports pro se workflows. Architected as matter-neutral civil-procedure skills (CCP civil rules, CEC evidence rules, fees and costs, local rules, citation format per the California Style Manual) plus subject-matter bundles. The first subject-matter bundle, ca-consumer-debt, covers FDCPA / Reg F / state UTPA-equivalent / chain-of-title doctrine. All workflows are skills (no slash commands) so the agent invokes them automatically from natural-language requests.
